endpoints.name: Gets the custom attributes for an applicant.
endpoints.description: Gets the custom attributes for an applicant.

endpoints.name: Updates the custom attributes for an applicant.
endpoints.description: This method only adds or updates attributes. Null values will be updated as nulls, but not deleted. API Import is available in the Advanced Plan.

endpoints.name: Deletes a custom attribute for an applicant.
endpoints.description: Deletes a custom attribute for an applicant.

endpoints.name: Gets the custom applicant attributes used by the organization.
endpoints.description: Gets the custom applicant attributes used by the organization.

endpoints.name: Gets the custom application attributes used by the organization.
endpoints.description: Gets the custom application attributes used by the organization.

endpoints.name: Requests the generation of application export files (tabular, pdf, zip).
endpoints.description:
Exports are generated asynchronously within SlideRoom.  To retrieve the export file generated by this request, use the api/v#/export/{token} endpoint to check the progress/result of the generation process.
PDF and ZIP exports are available in the Advanced Plan.

endpoints.name: Gets the custom attributes for an application.
endpoints.description: Gets the custom attributes for an application.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: Updates the custom attributes for an application. API Import is available in the Advanced Plan.
endpoints.description: This method only adds or updates attributes. Null values will be updated as nulls, but not deleted.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: Deletes a custom attribute for an application.
endpoints.description: Deletes a custom attribute for an application.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: Requests the generation of a single application export file (tabular, pdf, zip).
endpoints.description: Exports are generated asynchronously within SlideRoom.  To retrieve the export file generated by this request, use the api/v#/export/{token} endpoint to check the progress/result of the generation process.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: Gets the status/result of a requested export.
endpoints.description: Gets the status/result of a requested export.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.
